author: nflaig
content: that's not a dos though, honest builders are always able to deposit in that scenario, if the deposits per block goes above the target then it's also more expensive for the attacker, if it stays below, there is no dos at all, the most an attacker can do is add a surcharge to honest depositors (ie. the fee increase) but this cannot be sustained for long, not even on the testnet. And the eth you pay as fee is burned

author: nflaig
content: it's also irrelevant here, even if the contract allows to deposit just 1 wei, it would be fine, the fee mechanism handles this, we already have the same for consolidation request and withdrawal request, both of them don't have the 1 ETH min capital per request

author: nflaig
